arts.ttl: Salah replacement? Liverpool ready to move for €30m-rated Premier League winger
arts.sum: Liverpool are reportedly eyeing up a potential transfer move for Brighton winger Facundo Buonanotte, who is currently on loan at Leicester City. The talented 19-year-old is impressing in the Premier League at the moment, and it makes sense that bigger clubs might be starting to take notice of his performances. arts.ttl: Chelsea XIs vs Liverpool as Jadon Sancho dropped and Christopher Nkunku starts
arts.sum: Joe's XI : Sanchez; Gusto, Fofana, Tosin, Veiga; Fernandez, Caicedo; Madueke, Palmer, Neto; Nkunku. While Nicolas Jackson has impressed so far this season, I think up against Virgil van Dijk I'd fancy Christopher Nkunku to cause some more issues with his link-up play, so he starts.
